title: Vulnerable woman missing
description: KNYSNA NEWS - A young Hornlee woman,...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - A young Hornlee woman, Millison Ruiters, who has been deemed vulnerable, is being sought by police following her disappearance on 22 December. According to a missing persons report, Ruiters was last seen in Khayalethu on that day.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - A young Hornlee woman, Millison Ruiters, who has been deemed vulnerable, is being sought by police following her disappearance on 22 December. According to a missing persons report, Ruiters was last seen in Khayalethu on that day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Warrant officer Christopher Spies confirmed that a search for Ruiters is ongoing.","html":"Warrant officer Christopher Spies confirmed that a search for Ruiters is ongoing."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"Knysna police launched a search for Millison Ruiters (28) from Hamilton Street, Knysna who was reported as missing on 06 January,\" said Spies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The mentally disturbed woman had previously also been reported missing and was later found in Oudtshoorn.","html":"The mentally disturbed woman had previously also been reported missing and was later found in Oudtshoorn."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"At the time of her disappearance, she was wearing black tracksuit pants with white side stripes and a maroon long-sleeve shirt with a gold motif on the front."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Anyone who knows of Ruiters’ whereabouts or has information that could assist police is urged to contact Investigating Officer Sergeant Ntabeni on 078 359 3672, the Commander on Duty on 082 379 3411, or CPF representative Cheryl Britz on 082 574 9657.","html":"Anyone who knows of Ruiters’ whereabouts or has information that could assist police is urged to contact Investigating Officer Sergeant Ntabeni on 078 359 3672, the Commander on Duty on 082 379 3411, or CPF representative Cheryl Britz on 082 574 9657."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
